name: first-mortgage-balance-broker-correction-over-statement
anchor: F1.FB broker_correction tier vs mortgage_statement tier
rationale: mortgage_statement doc shows $225,000 (current per statement validity date). Broker correction asserts balance is now $222,500 (borrower made an unscheduled payment after the statement date). F1.FB canonical-map resolves to broker_correction tier — broker_correction overrides docs tier even when docs tier is mortgage_statement (authoritative within docs). Tests cross-tier precedence: broker > docs always, regardless of doc authority within docs tier.
notes: Two-event sequence. Distinct from A32 (intra-docs tier resolution) — A34 tests cross-tier broker > docs precedence.
